subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-12-20
subcodes.first_line: All the people are sacrificing their lives for the sake of the worthless (valueless) earth.
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @war and peace, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity of governments; political unity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
